7442 JSON-RPC initialize response payload. 

7443 """ 

7444 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7445 req_id = None 

7446 try: 

7447 try: 

7448 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

7449 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

7450 return ORJSONResponse( 

7451 status_code=400, 

7452 content={ 

7453 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7454 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

7455 "id": None, 

7456 }, 

7457 ) 

7458 

7459 req_id = body.get("id") 

7460 if req_id is None: 

7461 req_id = str(uuid.uuid4()) 

7462 

7463 if body.get("method") != "initialize": 

7464 return ORJSONResponse( 

7465 status_code=400, 

7466 content={ 

7467 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7468 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

7469 "id": req_id, 

7470 }, 

7471 ) 

7472 

7473 params = body.get("params", {}) 

7474 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

7475 params = {} 

7476 

7477 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7478 if server_id: 

7479 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7480 else: 

7481 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

7482 

7483 result = await _execute_rpc_initialize( 

7484 request, 

7485 user, 

7486 params=params, 

7487 server_id=server_id, 

7488 mcp_session_id=request.headers.get("mcp-session-id") or request.headers.get("x-mcp-session-id"), 

7489 ) 

7490 return ORJSONResponse(content={"jsonrpc": "2.0", "result": result, "id": req_id}) 

7491 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

7492 error = exc.to_dict() 

7493 return ORJSONResponse(content={"jsonrpc": "2.0", "error": error["error"], "id": req_id}) 

7494 except Exception as exc: 

7495 logger.error("Internal MCP initialize error: %s", exc) 

7496 return ORJSONResponse( 

7497 content={ 

7498 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7499 "error": {"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}, 

7500 "id": req_id, 

7501 } 

7502 ) 

7503 

7504 

7505@utility_router.delete("/_internal/mcp/session/") 

7506@utility_router.delete("/_internal/mcp/session") 

7507async def handle_internal_mcp_session_delete(request: Request): 

7508 """Handle trusted MCP session teardown forwarded from the local Rust runtime. 

7509 

7510 Args: 

7511 request: Trusted internal MCP session-delete request. 

7512 

7513 Returns: 

7514 Empty HTTP response indicating the session was removed. 

7515 """ 

7516 _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7517 auth_context = get_internal_mcp_auth_context(request) or {} 

7518 mcp_session_id = request.headers.get("mcp-session-id") or request.headers.get("x-mcp-session-id") 

7519 if not mcp_session_id: 

7520 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"detail": "mcp-session-id header is required"}) 

7521 

7522 if auth_context.get("_rust_session_validated") is not True: 

7523 session_allowed, deny_status, deny_detail = await _validate_streamable_session_access( 

7524 mcp_session_id=mcp_session_id, 

7525 user_context=auth_context, 

7526 ) 

7527 if not session_allowed: 

7528 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=deny_status, content={"detail": deny_detail}) 

7529 

7530 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7531 if server_id: 

7532 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7533 

7534 await session_registry.remove_session(mcp_session_id) 

7535 

7536 if settings.mcpgateway_session_affinity_enabled: 

7537 try: 

7538 # First-Party 

7539 from mcpgateway.services.session_affinity import get_session_affinity # pylint: disable=import-outside-toplevel 

7540 

7541 pool = get_session_affinity() 

7542 await pool.cleanup_session_owner(mcp_session_id) 

7543 except RuntimeError: 

7544 pass 

7545 

7546 return Response(status_code=204) 

7547 

7548 

7549@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/notifications/initialized/") 

7550@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/notifications/initialized") 

7551async def handle_internal_mcp_notifications_initialized(request: Request): 

7552 """Handle trusted MCP notifications/initialized requests from the local Rust runtime. 

7553 

7554 Args: 

7555 request: Trusted internal MCP notification request. 

7556 

7557 Returns: 

7558 Empty HTTP response acknowledging the notification. 

7559 

7560 Raises: 

7561 HTTPException: If trusted server-scope validation fails. 

7562 """ 

7563 _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7564 req_id = None 

7565 try: 

7566 try: 

7567 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

7568 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

7569 return ORJSONResponse( 

7570 status_code=400, 

7571 content={ 

7572 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7573 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

7574 "id": None, 

7575 }, 

7576 ) 

7577 

7578 req_id = body.get("id") 

7579 if body.get("method") != "notifications/initialized": 

7580 return ORJSONResponse( 

7581 status_code=400, 

7582 content={ 

7583 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7584 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

7585 "id": req_id, 

7586 }, 

7587 ) 

7588 

7589 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7590 if server_id: 

7591 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7592 

7593 logger.info("Client initialized") 

7594 await logging_service.notify("Client initialized", LogLevel.INFO) 

7595 return Response(status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT) 

7596 except HTTPException: 

7597 raise 

7598 except Exception as exc: 

7599 logger.error("Internal MCP notifications/initialized error: %s", exc) 

7600 return ORJSONResponse( 

7601 content={ 

7602 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7603 "error": {"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}, 

7604 "id": req_id, 

7605 } 

7606 ) 

7607 

7608 

7609@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/notifications/message/") 

7610@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/notifications/message") 

7611async def handle_internal_mcp_notifications_message(request: Request): 

7612 """Handle trusted MCP notifications/message requests from the local Rust runtime. 

7613 

7614 Args: 

7615 request: Trusted internal MCP notification request. 

7616 

7617 Returns: 

7618 Empty HTTP response acknowledging the notification. 

7619 

7620 Raises: 

7621 HTTPException: If trusted server-scope validation fails. 

7622 """ 

7623 _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7624 req_id = None 

7625 try: 

7626 try: 

7627 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

7628 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

7629 return ORJSONResponse( 

7630 status_code=400, 

7631 content={ 

7632 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7633 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

7634 "id": None, 

7635 }, 

7636 ) 

7637 

7638 req_id = body.get("id") 

7639 if body.get("method") != "notifications/message": 

7640 return ORJSONResponse( 

7641 status_code=400, 

7642 content={ 

7643 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7644 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

7645 "id": req_id, 

7646 }, 

7647 ) 

7648 

7649 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7650 if server_id: 

7651 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7652 

7653 params = body.get("params", {}) 

7654 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

7655 params = {} 

7656 

7657 await logging_service.notify( 

7658 params.get("data"), 

7659 LogLevel(params.get("level", "info")), 

7660 params.get("logger"), 

7661 ) 

7662 return Response(status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT) 

7663 except HTTPException: 

7664 raise 

7665 except Exception as exc: 

7666 logger.error("Internal MCP notifications/message error: %s", exc) 

7667 return ORJSONResponse( 

7668 content={ 

7669 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7670 "error": {"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}, 

7671 "id": req_id, 

7672 } 

7673 ) 

7674 

7675 

7676@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/notifications/cancelled/") 

7677@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/notifications/cancelled") 

7678async def handle_internal_mcp_notifications_cancelled(request: Request): 

7679 """Handle trusted MCP notifications/cancelled requests from the local Rust runtime. 

7680 

7681 Args: 

7682 request: Trusted internal MCP cancellation notification. 

7683 

7684 Returns: 

7685 Empty HTTP response acknowledging the cancellation. 

7686 

7687 Raises: 

7688 HTTPException: If cancellation authorization or trusted scope validation fails. 

7689 """ 

7690 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7691 req_id = None 

7692 try: 

7693 try: 

7694 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

7695 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

7696 return ORJSONResponse( 

7697 status_code=400, 

7698 content={ 

7699 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7700 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

7701 "id": None, 

7702 }, 

7703 ) 

7704 

7705 req_id = body.get("id") 

7706 if body.get("method") != "notifications/cancelled": 

7707 return ORJSONResponse( 

7708 status_code=400, 

7709 content={ 

7710 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7711 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

7712 "id": req_id, 

7713 }, 

7714 ) 

7715 

7716 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7717 if server_id: 

7718 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7719 

7720 params = body.get("params", {}) 

7721 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

7722 params = {} 

7723 

7724 raw_request_id = params.get("requestId") 

7725 request_id = str(raw_request_id) if raw_request_id is not None else None 

7726 reason = params.get("reason") 

7727 logger.info("Request cancelled: %s, reason: %s", request_id, reason) 

7728 if request_id is not None: 

7729 await _authorize_run_cancellation(request, user, request_id, as_jsonrpc_error=False) 

7730 await cancellation_service.cancel_run(request_id, reason=reason) 

7731 await logging_service.notify(f"Request cancelled: {request_id}", LogLevel.INFO) 

7732 return Response(status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT) 

7733 except HTTPException: 

7734 raise 

7735 except Exception as exc: 

7736 logger.error("Internal MCP notifications/cancelled error: %s", exc) 

7737 return ORJSONResponse( 

7738 content={ 

7739 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7740 "error": {"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}, 

7741 "id": req_id, 

7742 } 

7743 ) 

7744 

7745 

7746@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/tools/list/") 

7747@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/tools/list") 

7748async def handle_internal_mcp_tools_list(request: Request): 

7749 """Handle trusted server-scoped tools/list requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

7750 

7751 Args: 

7752 request: Trusted internal MCP tools/list request. 

7753 

7754 Returns: 

7755 MCP tools/list response payload for the requested virtual server. 

7756 

7757 Raises: 

7758 HTTPException: If the trusted server scope is missing or invalid. 

7759 """ 

7760 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") 

7761 if not server_id: 

7762 raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Missing trusted MCP server scope") 

7763 

7764 db = SessionLocal() 

7765 try: 

7766 user = await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

7767 request, 

7768 db, 

7769 permission="tools.read", 

7770 method="tools/list", 

7771 server_id=server_id, 

7772 ) 

7773 user_email, token_teams, is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

7774 if is_admin and token_teams is None: 

7775 user_email = None 

7776 token_teams = None 

7777 elif token_teams is None: 

7778 token_teams = [] 

7779 

7780 tools = await tool_service.list_server_mcp_tool_definitions( 

7781 db, 

7782 server_id, 

7783 user_email=user_email, 

7784 token_teams=token_teams, 

7785 ) 

7786 return ORJSONResponse(content={"tools": tools}) 

7787 except HTTPException: 

7788 try: 

7789 db.rollback() 

7790 except Exception: 

7791 try: 

7792 db.invalidate() 

7793 except Exception: 

7794 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

7795 raise 

7796 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

7797 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"code": exc.code, "message": exc.message, "data": exc.data}) 

7798 except Exception as exc: 

7799 try: 

7800 db.rollback() 

7801 except Exception: 

7802 try: 

7803 db.invalidate() 

7804 except Exception: 

7805 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

7806 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

7807 finally: 

7808 db.close() 

7809 

7810 

7811@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/list/") 

7812@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/list") 

7813async def handle_internal_mcp_resources_list(request: Request): 

7814 """Handle trusted resources/list requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

7815 

7816 Args: 

7817 request: Trusted internal MCP resources/list request. 

7818 

7819 Returns: 

7820 MCP resources/list response payload. 

7821 """ 

7822 db = SessionLocal() 

7823 req_id = None 

7824 try: 

7825 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7826 try: 

7827 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

7828 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

7829 return ORJSONResponse( 

7830 status_code=400, 

7831 content={ 

7832 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7833 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

7834 "id": None, 

7835 }, 

7836 ) 

7837 

7838 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

7839 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "resources/list": 

7840 return ORJSONResponse( 

7841 status_code=400, 

7842 content={ 

7843 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7844 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

7845 "id": req_id, 

7846 }, 

7847 ) 

7848 

7849 params = body.get("params", {}) 

7850 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

7851 params = {} 

7852 

7853 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7854 if server_id: 

7855 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7856 else: 

7857 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

7858 cursor = params.get("cursor") 

7859 

7860 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

7861 request, 

7862 db, 

7863 permission="resources.read", 

7864 method="resources/list", 

7865 server_id=server_id, 

7866 ) 

7867 

7868 user_email, token_teams, is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

7869 if is_admin and token_teams is None: 

7870 user_email = None 

7871 token_teams = None 

7872 elif token_teams is None: 

7873 token_teams = [] 

7874 

7875 if server_id: 

7876 resources = await resource_service.list_server_resources( 

7877 db, 

7878 server_id, 

7879 user_email=user_email, 

7880 token_teams=token_teams, 

7881 ) 

7882 payload = {"resources": [r.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) for r in resources]} 

7883 else: 

7884 resources, next_cursor = await resource_service.list_resources( 

7885 db, 

7886 cursor=cursor, 

7887 limit=0, 

7888 user_email=user_email, 

7889 token_teams=token_teams, 

7890 ) 

7891 payload = {"resources": [r.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) for r in resources]} 

7892 if next_cursor: 

7893 payload["nextCursor"] = next_cursor 

7894 

7895 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

7896 db.commit() 

7897 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

7898 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

7899 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

7900 except Exception as exc: 

7901 try: 

7902 db.rollback() 

7903 except Exception: 

7904 try: 

7905 db.invalidate() 

7906 except Exception: 

7907 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

7908 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

7909 finally: 

7910 db.close() 

7911 

7912 

7913@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/read/") 

7914@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/read") 

7915async def handle_internal_mcp_resources_read(request: Request): 

7916 """Handle trusted resources/read requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

7917 

7918 Args: 

7919 request: Trusted internal MCP resources/read request. 

7920 

7921 Returns: 

7922 MCP resources/read response payload. 

7923 """ 

7924 db = SessionLocal() 

7925 req_id = None 

7926 uri = None 

7927 try: 

7928 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

7929 try: 

7930 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

7931 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

7932 return ORJSONResponse( 

7933 status_code=400, 

7934 content={ 

7935 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7936 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

7937 "id": None, 

7938 }, 

7939 ) 

7940 

7941 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

7942 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "resources/read": 

7943 return ORJSONResponse( 

7944 status_code=400, 

7945 content={ 

7946 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

7947 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

7948 "id": req_id, 

7949 }, 

7950 ) 

7951 

7952 params = body.get("params", {}) 

7953 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

7954 params = {} 

7955 

7956 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

7957 if server_id: 

7958 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

7959 else: 

7960 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

7961 

7962 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

7963 request, 

7964 db, 

7965 permission="resources.read", 

7966 method="resources/read", 

7967 server_id=server_id, 

7968 ) 

7969 

7970 uri = params.get("uri") 

7971 request_id = params.get("requestId") 

7972 meta_data = params.get("_meta") 

7973 if not uri: 

7974 return ORJSONResponse( 

7975 status_code=400, 

7976 content={ 

7977 "code": -32602, 

7978 "message": "Missing resource URI in parameters", 

7979 "data": params, 

7980 }, 

7981 ) 

7982 

7983 auth_user_email, auth_token_teams, auth_is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

7984 if auth_is_admin and auth_token_teams is None: 

7985 auth_user_email = None 

7986 elif auth_token_teams is None: 

7987 auth_token_teams = [] 

7988 

7989 plugin_context_table = getattr(request.state, "plugin_context_table", None) 

7990 plugin_global_context = getattr(request.state, "plugin_global_context", None) 

7991 result = await resource_service.read_resource( 

7992 db, 

7993 resource_uri=uri, 

7994 request_id=request_id, 

7995 user=auth_user_email, 

7996 server_id=server_id, 

7997 token_teams=auth_token_teams, 

7998 plugin_context_table=plugin_context_table, 

7999 plugin_global_context=plugin_global_context, 

8000 meta_data=meta_data, 

8001 ) 

8002 # First-Party 

8003 from mcpgateway.common.models import ResourceContent # pylint: disable=import-outside-toplevel 

8004 

8005 if isinstance(result, ResourceContent): 

8006 normalized_content = {"uri": result.uri} 

8007 if result.mime_type: 

8008 normalized_content["mimeType"] = result.mime_type 

8009 if result.text is not None: 

8010 normalized_content["text"] = result.text 

8011 elif result.blob is not None: 

8012 normalized_content["blob"] = base64.b64encode(result.blob).decode("ascii") 

8013 payload = {"contents": [normalized_content]} 

8014 elif hasattr(result, "model_dump"): 

8015 payload = {"contents": [result.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True)]} 

8016 else: 

8017 payload = {"contents": [result]} 

8018 

8019 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8020 db.commit() 

8021 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

8022 except ResourceNotFoundError as exc: 

8023 return ORJSONResponse( 

8024 status_code=404, 

8025 content={ 

8026 "code": -32002, 

8027 "message": str(exc), 

8028 "data": {"uri": uri} if uri else None, 

8029 }, 

8030 ) 

8031 except ResourceError as exc: 

8032 return ORJSONResponse( 

8033 status_code=400, 

8034 content={ 

8035 "code": -32602, 

8036 "message": str(exc), 

8037 "data": {"uri": uri} if uri else None, 

8038 }, 

8039 ) 

8040 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8041 status_code = 403 if exc.code == -32003 else 400 

8042 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=status_code, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8043 except Exception as exc: 

8044 try: 

8045 db.rollback() 

8046 except Exception: 

8047 try: 

8048 db.invalidate() 

8049 except Exception: 

8050 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8051 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

8052 finally: 

8053 db.close() 

8054 

8055 

8056@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/subscribe/") 

8057@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/subscribe") 

8058async def handle_internal_mcp_resources_subscribe(request: Request): 

8059 """Handle trusted resources/subscribe requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8060 

8061 Args: 

8062 request: Trusted internal MCP resources/subscribe request. 

8063 

8064 Returns: 

8065 Empty JSON response confirming the subscription. 

8066 """ 

8067 db = SessionLocal() 

8068 req_id = None 

8069 try: 

8070 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8071 try: 

8072 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8073 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8074 return ORJSONResponse( 

8075 status_code=400, 

8076 content={ 

8077 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8078 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8079 "id": None, 

8080 }, 

8081 ) 

8082 

8083 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8084 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "resources/subscribe": 

8085 return ORJSONResponse( 

8086 status_code=400, 

8087 content={ 

8088 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8089 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8090 "id": req_id, 

8091 }, 

8092 ) 

8093 

8094 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8095 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8096 params = {} 

8097 

8098 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

8099 if server_id: 

8100 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

8101 

8102 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8103 request, 

8104 db, 

8105 permission="resources.read", 

8106 method="resources/subscribe", 

8107 server_id=server_id, 

8108 ) 

8109 

8110 uri = params.get("uri") 

8111 if not uri: 

8112 return ORJSONResponse( 

8113 status_code=400, 

8114 content={ 

8115 "code": -32602, 

8116 "message": "Missing resource URI in parameters", 

8117 "data": params, 

8118 }, 

8119 ) 

8120 

8121 access_user_email, access_token_teams = get_scoped_resource_access_context(request, user) 

8122 user_email = get_user_email(user) 

8123 subscription = ResourceSubscription(uri=uri, subscriber_id=user_email) 

8124 await resource_service.subscribe_resource( 

8125 db, 

8126 subscription, 

8127 user_email=access_user_email, 

8128 token_teams=access_token_teams, 

8129 ) 

8130 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8131 db.commit() 

8132 return ORJSONResponse(content={}) 

8133 except ResourceNotFoundError as exc: 

8134 return ORJSONResponse( 

8135 status_code=404, 

8136 content={"code": -32002, "message": str(exc), "data": None}, 

8137 ) 

8138 except PermissionError: 

8139 return ORJSONResponse( 

8140 status_code=403, 

8141 content={"code": -32003, "message": _ACCESS_DENIED_MSG, "data": {"method": "resources/subscribe"}}, 

8142 ) 

8143 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8144 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8145 except Exception as exc: 

8146 try: 

8147 db.rollback() 

8148 except Exception: 

8149 try: 

8150 db.invalidate() 

8151 except Exception: 

8152 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8153 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

8154 finally: 

8155 db.close() 

8156 

8157

8168 """

8173 try: 

8174 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8175 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8176 return ORJSONResponse( 

8177 status_code=400, 

8178 content={ 

8179 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8180 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8181 "id": None, 

8182 }, 

8183 ) 

8184 

8185 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8186 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "resources/unsubscribe": 

8187 return ORJSONResponse( 

8188 status_code=400, 

8189 content={ 

8190 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8191 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8192 "id": req_id, 

8193 }, 

8194 ) 

8195 

8196 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8197 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8198 params = {} 

8199 

8200 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

8201 if server_id: 

8202 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

8203 

8204 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request(

8210 ) 

8211 

8212 uri = params.get("uri") 

8213 if not uri: 

8214 return ORJSONResponse( 

8215 status_code=400, 

8216 content={ 

8217 "code": -32602, 

8218 "message": "Missing resource URI in parameters", 

8219 "data": params, 

8220 }, 

8221 ) 

8222 

8223 user_email = get_user_email(user) 

8224 subscription = ResourceSubscription(uri=uri, subscriber_id=user_email) 

8225 await resource_service.unsubscribe_resource(db, subscription) 

8226 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8227 db.commit() 

8228 return ORJSONResponse(content={}) 

8229 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8230 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8231 except Exception as exc: 

8232 try: 

8233 db.rollback() 

8234 except Exception: 

8235 try: 

8236 db.invalidate() 

8237 except Exception: 

8238 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8239 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

8240 finally: 

8241 db.close() 

8242

8244@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/templates/list/") 

8245@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/templates/list") 

8246async def handle_internal_mcp_resource_templates_list(request: Request): 

8247 """Handle trusted resources/templates/list requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8248 

8249 Args: 

8250 request: Trusted internal MCP resources/templates/list request. 

8251 

8252 Returns: 

8253 MCP resources/templates/list response payload. 

8254 

8255 Raises: 

8256 Exception: Propagated after best-effort rollback when unexpected failures occur. 

8257 """ 

8258 db = SessionLocal() 

8259 req_id = None 

8260 try: 

8261 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8262 try: 

8263 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8264 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8265 return ORJSONResponse( 

8266 status_code=400, 

8267 content={ 

8268 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8269 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8270 "id": None, 

8271 }, 

8272 ) 

8273 

8274 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8275 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "resources/templates/list": 

8276 return ORJSONResponse( 

8277 status_code=400, 

8278 content={ 

8279 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8280 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8281 "id": req_id, 

8282 }, 

8283 ) 

8284 

8285 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8286 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8287 params = {} 

8288 

8289 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

8290 if server_id: 

8291 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

8292 else: 

8293 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

8294 

8295 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8296 request, 

8297 db, 

8298 permission="resources.read", 

8299 method="resources/templates/list", 

8300 server_id=server_id, 

8301 ) 

8302 

8303 # SECURITY (Layer 1): (None, None) for admin bypass triggers the private-exclusion WHERE clause in the service. 

8304 auth_user_email, auth_token_teams = get_scoped_resource_access_context(request, user) 

8305 

8306 resource_templates = await resource_service.list_resource_templates( 

8307 db, 

8308 user_email=auth_user_email, 

8309 token_teams=auth_token_teams, 

8310 server_id=server_id, 

8311 ) 

8312 payload = {"resourceTemplates": [rt.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) for rt in resource_templates]} 

8313 

8314 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8315 db.commit() 

8316 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

8317 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8318 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8319 except Exception: 

8320 try: 

8321 db.rollback() 

8322 except Exception: 

8323 try: 

8324 db.invalidate() 

8325 except Exception: 

8326 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8327 raise 

8328 finally: 

8329 db.close() 

8330 

8331 

8332@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/roots/list/") 

8333@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/roots/list")

8335 """Handle trusted roots/list requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8336

8338 request: Trusted internal MCP roots/list request. 

8339 

8340 Returns: 

8341 MCP roots/list response payload. 

8342 

8343 Raises: 

8344 Exception: Propagated after best-effort rollback when unexpected failures occur. 

8345 """

8347 req_id = None 

8348 try: 

8349 _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8350 try: 

8351 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8352 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8353 return ORJSONResponse( 

8354 status_code=400, 

8355 content={ 

8356 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8357 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8358 "id": None, 

8359 }, 

8360 ) 

8361 

8362 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8363 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "roots/list": 

8364 return ORJSONResponse( 

8365 status_code=400, 

8366 content={ 

8367 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8368 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8369 "id": req_id, 

8370 }, 

8371 ) 

8372 

8373 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8374 request, 

8375 db, 

8376 permission="admin.system_config", 

8377 method="roots/list", 

8378 server_id=None, 

8379 ) 

8380 roots = await root_service.list_roots() 

8381 payload = {"roots": [r.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) for r in roots]} 

8382 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8383 db.commit() 

8384 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

8385 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8386 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8387 except Exception: 

8388 try: 

8389 db.rollback() 

8390 except Exception: 

8391 try: 

8392 db.invalidate() 

8393 except Exception: 

8394 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8395 raise 

8396 finally: 

8397 db.close()

8400@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/completion/complete/") 

8401@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/completion/complete") 

8402async def handle_internal_mcp_completion_complete(request: Request): 

8403 """Handle trusted completion/complete requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8404 

8405 Args: 

8406 request: Trusted internal MCP completion/complete request. 

8407 

8408 Returns: 

8409 MCP completion response payload. 

8410 """ 

8411 db = SessionLocal() 

8412 req_id = None 

8413 try: 

8414 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8415 try: 

8416 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8417 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8418 return ORJSONResponse( 

8419 status_code=400, 

8420 content={ 

8421 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8422 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8423 "id": None, 

8424 }, 

8425 ) 

8426 

8427 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8428 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "completion/complete": 

8429 return ORJSONResponse( 

8430 status_code=400, 

8431 content={ 

8432 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8433 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8434 "id": req_id, 

8435 }, 

8436 ) 

8437 

8438 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8439 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8440 params = {} 

8441 

8442 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

8443 if server_id: 

8444 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

8445 else: 

8446 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

8447 

8448 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8449 request, 

8450 db, 

8451 permission="tools.read", 

8452 method="completion/complete", 

8453 server_id=server_id, 

8454 ) 

8455 

8456 user_email, token_teams, is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

8457 if is_admin and token_teams is None: 

8458 user_email = None 

8459 token_teams = None 

8460 elif token_teams is None: 

8461 token_teams = [] 

8462 

8463 payload = await completion_service.handle_completion( 

8464 db, 

8465 params, 

8466 user_email=user_email, 

8467 token_teams=token_teams, 

8468 ) 

8469 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8470 db.commit() 

8471 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

8472 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8473 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8474 except Exception as exc: 

8475 try: 

8476 db.rollback() 

8477 except Exception: 

8478 try: 

8479 db.invalidate() 

8480 except Exception: 

8481 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8482 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

8483 finally: 

8484 db.close() 

8485 

8486

8553@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/logging/setLevel/")

8556 """Handle trusted logging/setLevel requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8557 

8558 Args: 

8559 request: Trusted internal MCP logging/setLevel request. 

8560 

8561 Returns: 

8562 Empty JSON response confirming the new log level. 

8563 """ 

8564 db = SessionLocal() 

8565 req_id = None 

8566 try: 

8567 _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8568 try: 

8569 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8570 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8571 return ORJSONResponse( 

8572 status_code=400, 

8573 content={ 

8574 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8575 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8576 "id": None, 

8577 }, 

8578 ) 

8579 

8580 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8581 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "logging/setLevel": 

8582 return ORJSONResponse( 

8583 status_code=400, 

8584 content={ 

8585 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8586 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8587 "id": req_id, 

8588 }, 

8589 ) 

8590 

8591 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8592 request, 

8593 db, 

8594 permission="admin.system_config", 

8595 method="logging/setLevel", 

8596 server_id=None, 

8597 ) 

8598 

8599 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8600 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8601 params = {} 

8602 

8603 level = LogLevel(params.get("level")) 

8604 await logging_service.set_level(level) 

8605 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8606 db.commit() 

8607 return ORJSONResponse(content={}) 

8608 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8609 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8610 except Exception as exc:

8612 db.rollback() 

8613 except Exception: 

8614 try: 

8615 db.invalidate() 

8616 except Exception: 

8617 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8618 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"code": -32000, "message": "Internal error", "data": str(exc)}) 

8619 finally: 

8620 db.close()

8623@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/prompts/list/") 

8624@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/prompts/list") 

8625async def handle_internal_mcp_prompts_list(request: Request): 

8626 """Handle trusted prompts/list requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8627 

8628 Args: 

8629 request: Trusted internal MCP prompts/list request. 

8630 

8631 Returns: 

8632 MCP prompts/list response payload. 

8633 

8634 Raises: 

8635 Exception: Propagated after best-effort rollback when unexpected failures occur. 

8636 """ 

8637 db = SessionLocal() 

8638 req_id = None 

8639 try: 

8640 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8641 try: 

8642 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8643 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8644 return ORJSONResponse( 

8645 status_code=400, 

8646 content={ 

8647 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8648 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8649 "id": None, 

8650 }, 

8651 ) 

8652 

8653 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8654 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "prompts/list": 

8655 return ORJSONResponse( 

8656 status_code=400, 

8657 content={ 

8658 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8659 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8660 "id": req_id, 

8661 }, 

8662 ) 

8663 

8664 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8665 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8666 params = {} 

8667 

8668 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

8669 if server_id: 

8670 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

8671 else: 

8672 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

8673 cursor = params.get("cursor") 

8674 

8675 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8676 request, 

8677 db, 

8678 permission="prompts.read", 

8679 method="prompts/list", 

8680 server_id=server_id, 

8681 ) 

8682 

8683 user_email, token_teams, is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

8684 if is_admin and token_teams is None: 

8685 user_email = None 

8686 token_teams = None 

8687 elif token_teams is None: 

8688 token_teams = [] 

8689 

8690 if server_id: 

8691 prompts = await prompt_service.list_server_prompts( 

8692 db, 

8693 server_id, 

8694 cursor=cursor, 

8695 user_email=user_email, 

8696 token_teams=token_teams, 

8697 ) 

8698 payload = {"prompts": [p.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) for p in prompts]} 

8699 else: 

8700 prompts, next_cursor = await prompt_service.list_prompts( 

8701 db, 

8702 cursor=cursor, 

8703 limit=0, 

8704 user_email=user_email, 

8705 token_teams=token_teams, 

8706 ) 

8707 payload = {"prompts": [p.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) for p in prompts]} 

8708 if next_cursor: 

8709 payload["nextCursor"] = next_cursor 

8710 

8711 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8712 db.commit() 

8713 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

8714 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8715 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8716 except Exception: 

8717 try: 

8718 db.rollback() 

8719 except Exception: 

8720 try: 

8721 db.invalidate() 

8722 except Exception: 

8723 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8724 raise 

8725 finally: 

8726 db.close() 

8727 

8728 

8729@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/prompts/get/") 

8730@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/prompts/get") 

8731async def handle_internal_mcp_prompts_get(request: Request): 

8732 """Handle trusted prompts/get requests forwarded from the Rust runtime. 

8733 

8734 Args: 

8735 request: Trusted internal MCP prompts/get request. 

8736 

8737 Returns: 

8738 MCP prompts/get response payload. 

8739 

8740 Raises: 

8741 Exception: Propagated after best-effort rollback when unexpected failures occur. 

8742 """ 

8743 db = SessionLocal() 

8744 req_id = None 

8745 name = None 

8746 try: 

8747 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

8748 try: 

8749 body = orjson.loads(await request.body()) 

8750 except orjson.JSONDecodeError: 

8751 return ORJSONResponse( 

8752 status_code=400, 

8753 content={ 

8754 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8755 "error": {"code": -32700, "message": "Parse error"}, 

8756 "id": None, 

8757 }, 

8758 ) 

8759 

8760 req_id = body.get("id") if isinstance(body, dict) else None 

8761 if not isinstance(body, dict) or body.get("method") != "prompts/get": 

8762 return ORJSONResponse( 

8763 status_code=400, 

8764 content={ 

8765 "jsonrpc": "2.0", 

8766 "error": {"code": -32600, "message": "Invalid Request"}, 

8767 "id": req_id, 

8768 }, 

8769 ) 

8770 

8771 params = body.get("params", {}) 

8772 if not isinstance(params, dict): 

8773 params = {} 

8774 

8775 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") if request.headers.get("x-contextforge-mcp-runtime") == "rust" else None 

8776 if server_id: 

8777 _enforce_internal_mcp_server_scope(request, server_id) 

8778 else: 

8779 server_id = params.get("server_id") 

8780 

8781 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8782 request, 

8783 db, 

8784 permission="prompts.read", 

8785 method="prompts/get", 

8786 server_id=server_id, 

8787 ) 

8788 

8789 name = params.get("name") 

8790 arguments = params.get("arguments", {}) 

8791 meta_data = params.get("_meta") 

8792 if not name: 

8793 return ORJSONResponse( 

8794 status_code=400, 

8795 content={ 

8796 "code": -32602, 

8797 "message": "Missing prompt name in parameters", 

8798 "data": params, 

8799 }, 

8800 ) 

8801 

8802 auth_user_email, auth_token_teams, auth_is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

8803 if auth_is_admin and auth_token_teams is None: 

8804 auth_user_email = None 

8805 elif auth_token_teams is None: 

8806 auth_token_teams = [] 

8807 

8808 plugin_context_table = getattr(request.state, "plugin_context_table", None) 

8809 plugin_global_context = getattr(request.state, "plugin_global_context", None) 

8810 result = await prompt_service.get_prompt( 

8811 db, 

8812 name, 

8813 arguments, 

8814 user=auth_user_email, 

8815 server_id=server_id, 

8816 token_teams=auth_token_teams, 

8817 plugin_context_table=plugin_context_table, 

8818 plugin_global_context=plugin_global_context, 

8819 _meta_data=meta_data, 

8820 ) 

8821 payload = result.model_dump(by_alias=True, exclude_none=True) if hasattr(result, "model_dump") else result 

8822 

8823 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8824 db.commit() 

8825 return ORJSONResponse(content=payload) 

8826 except PromptNotFoundError as exc: 

8827 return ORJSONResponse( 

8828 status_code=404, 

8829 content={ 

8830 "code": -32002, 

8831 "message": str(exc), 

8832 "data": {"name": name} if name else None, 

8833 }, 

8834 ) 

8835 except PromptError as exc: 

8836 try: 

8837 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8838 db.rollback() 

8839 except Exception: 

8840 try: 

8841 db.invalidate() 

8842 except Exception: 

8843 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8844 return ORJSONResponse( 

8845 status_code=422, 

8846 content={ 

8847 "code": -32000, 

8848 "message": str(exc), 

8849 "data": {"name": name} if name else None, 

8850 }, 

8851 ) 

8852 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8853 status_code = 403 if exc.code == -32003 else 400 

8854 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=status_code, content=exc.to_dict()["error"]) 

8855 except Exception: 

8856 try: 

8857 db.rollback() 

8858 except Exception: 

8859 try: 

8860 db.invalidate() 

8861 except Exception: 

8862 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8863 raise 

8864 finally: 

8865 db.close() 

8866 

8867 

8868@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/tools/list/authz/") 

8869@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/tools/list/authz") 

8870async def handle_internal_mcp_tools_list_authz(request: Request): 

8871 """Authorize trusted server-scoped tools/list requests for the Rust direct-DB path. 

8872 

8873 Args: 

8874 request: Trusted internal MCP authz request. 

8875 

8876 Returns: 

8877 Empty success response when the request is authorized. 

8878 """ 

8879 return await _authorize_internal_mcp_server_scoped_method( 

8880 request, 

8881 permission="tools.read", 

8882 method="tools/list", 

8883 ) 

8884 

8885 

8886async def _authorize_internal_mcp_server_scoped_method( 

8887 request: Request, 

8888 *, 

8889 permission: str, 

8890 method: str, 

8891) -> Response: 

8892 """Authorize a trusted server-scoped MCP method for Rust direct-path execution. 

8893 

8894 Args: 

8895 request: Trusted internal MCP authz request. 

8896 permission: Permission required for the target method. 

8897 method: MCP method name being authorized. 

8898 

8899 Returns: 

8900 Empty success response when the method is authorized and remains eligible 

8901 for Rust direct execution, or a JSON success payload instructing Rust to 

8902 forward the request to Python when plugin hooks require Python 

8903 execution. Returns a JSON error response when authorization fails. 

8904 

8905 Raises: 

8906 HTTPException: If the trusted server scope header is missing. 

8907 Exception: Propagated after best-effort rollback when unexpected failures occur. 

8908 """ 

8909 server_id = request.headers.get("x-contextforge-server-id") 

8910 if not server_id: 

8911 raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Missing trusted MCP server scope") 

8912 

8913 db = SessionLocal() 

8914 try: 

8915 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

8916 request, 

8917 db, 

8918 permission=permission, 

8919 method=method, 

8920 server_id=server_id, 

8921 ) 

8922 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

8923 db.commit() 

8924 plugin_manager = await get_plugin_manager() 

8925 fallback_reason = _server_scoped_direct_execution_fallback_reason(method, plugin_manager) 

8926 if fallback_reason: 

8927 return ORJSONResponse( 

8928 status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, 

8929 content={ 

8930 "directExecutionEligible": False, 

8931 "fallbackReason": fallback_reason, 

8932 }, 

8933 ) 

8934 return Response(status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT) 

8935 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

8936 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"code": exc.code, "message": exc.message, "data": exc.data}) 

8937 except Exception: 

8938 try: 

8939 db.rollback() 

8940 except Exception: 

8941 try: 

8942 db.invalidate() 

8943 except Exception: 

8944 pass # nosec B110 - Best effort cleanup on connection failure 

8945 raise 

8946 finally: 

8947 db.close() 

8948 

8949 

8950def _server_scoped_direct_execution_fallback_reason(method: str, plugin_manager) -> Optional[str]: 

8951 """Return a direct-execution fallback reason for server-scoped Rust MCP calls. 

8952 

8953 This fail-closed helper lets Python remain the source of truth for plugin 

8954 semantics. Rust can safely execute DB-direct reads only when no relevant 

8955 prompt/resource hooks are configured. 

8956 

8957 Args: 

8958 method: MCP method name being considered for Rust direct execution. 

8959 plugin_manager: Plugin manager instance to check for configured hooks. 

8960 

8961 Returns: 

8962 A stable fallback reason when Python must handle the request to preserve 

8963 plugin semantics, otherwise ``None``. 

8964 """ 

8965 if not plugin_manager: 

8966 return None 

8967 

8968 if method == "resources/read": 

8969 if plugin_manager.has_hooks_for(ResourceHookType.RESOURCE_PRE_FETCH) or plugin_manager.has_hooks_for(ResourceHookType.RESOURCE_POST_FETCH): 

8970 return "resource-hooks-configured" 

8971 if method == "prompts/get": 

8972 if plugin_manager.has_hooks_for(PromptHookType.PROMPT_PRE_FETCH) or plugin_manager.has_hooks_for(PromptHookType.PROMPT_POST_FETCH): 

8973 return "prompt-hooks-configured" 

8974 return None 

8975 

8976 

8977@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/list/authz/") 

8978@utility_router.post("/_internal/mcp/resources/list/authz") 

8979async def handle_internal_mcp_resources_list_authz(request: Request): 

8980 """Authorize trusted server-scoped resources/list requests for Rust direct-path execution. 

8981 

8982 Args: 

8983 request: Trusted internal MCP authz request. 

8984 

8985 Returns: 

8986 Empty success response when the request is authorized. 

8987 """ 

8988 return await _authorize_internal_mcp_server_scoped_method( 

8989 request, 

8990 permission="resources.read", 

8991 method="resources/list", 

8992 ) 

8993 

8994

9005 """

9008 permission="resources.read", 

9009 method="resources/read", 

9010 )

9052 """Authorize trusted server-scoped prompts/get requests for Rust direct-path execution.

9067# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

9068# Internal A2A authorization endpoints (Rust A2A runtime sidecar) 

9069# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

9070 

9071 

9072@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/authenticate/") 

9073@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/authenticate") 

9074async def handle_internal_a2a_authenticate(request: Request): 

9075 """Authenticate an inbound A2A request for Rust runtime execution. 

9076 

9077 Delegates to the shared MCP authenticate handler — the auth flow is 

9078 identical (validate credentials, return auth context). 

9079 """ 

9080 return await handle_internal_mcp_authenticate(request) 

9081 

9082 

9083async def _authorize_internal_a2a_method( 

9084 request: Request, 

9085 *, 

9086 permission: str, 

9087 method: str, 

9088) -> Response: 

9089 """Authorize a trusted internal A2A method for Rust module execution. 

9090 

9091 Reuses the core authorization machinery from the MCP runtime path. 

9092 """ 

9093 db = SessionLocal() 

9094 try: 

9095 await _authorize_internal_mcp_request( 

9096 request, 

9097 db, 

9098 permission=permission, 

9099 method=method, 

9100 ) 

9101 if db.is_active and db.in_transaction() is not None: 

9102 db.commit() 

9103 return Response(status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT) 

9104 except JSONRPCError as exc: 

9105 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"code": exc.code, "message": exc.message, "data": exc.data}) 

9106 except Exception: 

9107 logger.exception("Internal A2A authz error for method=%s permission=%s", method, permission) 

9108 try: 

9109 db.rollback() 

9110 except Exception: 

9111 try: 

9112 db.invalidate() 

9113 except Exception: 

9114 pass # nosec B110 

9115 raise 

9116 finally: 

9117 db.close() 

9118 

9119 

9120def _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request: Request) -> tuple[Optional[str], Optional[List[str]]]: 

9121 """Return scoped visibility context for trusted internal A2A requests.""" 

9122 user = _build_internal_mcp_forwarded_user(request) 

9123 user_email, token_teams, is_admin = get_rpc_filter_context(request, user) 

9124 

9125 if is_admin and token_teams is None: 

9126 return user_email, None 

9127 if token_teams is None: 

9128 return user_email, [] 

9129 return user_email, token_teams 

9130 

9131 

9132@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/invoke/authz/") 

9133@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/invoke/authz") 

9134async def handle_internal_a2a_invoke_authz(request: Request): 

9135 """Authorize trusted A2A invoke requests for Rust module execution.""" 

9136 return await _authorize_internal_a2a_method(request, permission="a2a.invoke", method="a2a/invoke") 

9137 

9138 

9139@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/list/authz/") 

9140@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/list/authz") 

9141async def handle_internal_a2a_list_authz(request: Request): 

9142 """Authorize trusted A2A list requests for Rust module execution.""" 

9143 return await _authorize_internal_a2a_method(request, permission="a2a.read", method="a2a/list") 

9144 

9145 

9146@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/get/authz/") 

9147@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/get/authz") 

9148async def handle_internal_a2a_get_authz(request: Request): 

9149 """Authorize trusted A2A get requests for Rust module execution.""" 

9150 return await _authorize_internal_a2a_method(request, permission="a2a.read", method="a2a/get") 

9151 

9152 

9153# DbA2AAgent.id is `uuid.uuid4().hex` — 32 lower-case hex chars, no dashes. 

9154# Used to detect when a resolve identifier is a primary-key reference vs a 

9155# plain name; kept here (not in uaid module) because it's specific to the 

9156# internal resolve endpoint's lookup dispatch. 

9157_UUID_HEX_RE = re.compile(r"[0-9a-f]{32}") 

9158 

9159 

9160@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/agents/{agent_name}/resolve/") 

9161@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/agents/{agent_name}/resolve") 

9162async def handle_internal_a2a_agent_resolve(request: Request, agent_name: str): 

9163 """Resolve an A2A agent record for Rust module execution. 

9164 

9165 Returns the agent's endpoint, auth configuration (encrypted), and 

9166 protocol version so the Rust sidecar can invoke it directly. 

9167 """ 

9168 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9169 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9170 

9171 db = SessionLocal() 

9172 try: 

9173 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9174 service = A2AAgentService() 

9175 # Reject leading/trailing whitespace outright rather than silently 

9176 # falling through to the name branch — a malicious caller could 

9177 # otherwise wrap a UAID or UUID in spaces to bypass the kind 

9178 # dispatch (e.g., ` <32-hex>` probes the name column instead of 

9179 # id). Names in the DB never carry flanking whitespace either, so 

9180 # this can't false-positive on legitimate input. 

9181 if agent_name != agent_name.strip(): 

9182 logger.warning("A2A agent resolve rejected: identifier has surrounding whitespace (%r)", agent_name) 

9183 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "agent identifier must not contain leading or trailing whitespace"}) 

9184 

9185 # Dispatch lookup on identifier kind so a collision across the 

9186 # name / id / uaid columns can't silently cross-select the wrong 

9187 # agent. UAID prefix and 32-hex UUIDs are distinctive; everything 

9188 # else falls through to name. 

9189 agent = None 

9190 if uaid_utils.is_uaid(agent_name): 

9191 agent = db.query(DbA2AAgent).filter(DbA2AAgent.uaid == agent_name, DbA2AAgent.enabled.is_(True)).first() 

9192 elif _UUID_HEX_RE.fullmatch(agent_name): 

9193 agent = db.query(DbA2AAgent).filter(DbA2AAgent.id == agent_name, DbA2AAgent.enabled.is_(True)).first() 

9194 if agent is None: 

9195 agent = db.query(DbA2AAgent).filter(DbA2AAgent.name == agent_name, DbA2AAgent.enabled.is_(True)).first() 

9196 if not agent: 

9197 a2a_server_service = A2AServerService() 

9198 server_agent = a2a_server_service.resolve_server_agent(db, agent_name, user_email=user_email, token_teams=token_teams) 

9199 if server_agent: 

9200 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=server_agent) 

9201 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"agent '{agent_name}' not found"}) 

9202 if not await service._check_agent_access(db, agent, user_email, token_teams): # pylint: disable=protected-access 

9203 # Surface visibility-denial as 403 to the trusted sidecar 

9204 # caller (inside _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request 

9205 # above) so it can avoid falling through to UAID 

9206 # cross-gateway dispatch for agents that exist locally but 

9207 # the requester cannot see. The sidecar is expected to 

9208 # translate this back to 404 when responding to the end 

9209 # user so existence of private agents is not leaked. 

9210 logger.warning("A2A agent %r visibility-denied for user=%s teams=%s on resolve", agent_name, user_email, token_teams) 

9211 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": f"access denied to agent '{agent_name}'"}) 

9212 

9213 result = { 

9214 "agent_id": agent.id, 

9215 "name": agent.name, 

9216 "endpoint_url": agent.endpoint_url, 

9217 "agent_type": agent.agent_type, 

9218 "protocol_version": agent.protocol_version, 

9219 "auth_type": agent.auth_type, 

9220 } 

9221 # Return encrypted auth values — Rust decrypts them with the shared secret. 

9222 if agent.auth_value: 

9223 result["auth_value_encrypted"] = agent.auth_value 

9224 if agent.auth_query_params: 

9225 result["auth_query_params_encrypted"] = agent.auth_query_params 

9226 

9227 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=result) 

9228 except Exception: 

9229 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9230 try: 

9231 db.rollback() 

9232 except Exception: 

9233 try: 

9234 db.invalidate() 

9235 except Exception: 

9236 pass # nosec B110 

9237 raise 

9238 finally: 

9239 db.close() 

9240 

9241 

9242@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/agents/{agent_name}/card/") 

9243@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/agents/{agent_name}/card") 

9244async def handle_internal_a2a_agent_card(request: Request, agent_name: str): 

9245 """Return the A2A AgentCard for an agent. 

9246 

9247 Called by the Rust sidecar to serve GetExtendedAgentCard / 

9248 agent/getExtendedCard / agent/getAuthenticatedExtendedCard requests. 

9249 """ 

9250 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9251 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9252 

9253 db = SessionLocal() 

9254 try: 

9255 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9256 service = A2AAgentService() 

9257 

9258 # Layer-1 visibility is enforced inside ``get_agent_card`` (PR #4341): 

9259 # admin bypass with no email cannot read another user's private agent. 

9260 # The denial path returns None so the response falls through to the 

9261 # not-found branch below without leaking existence. We still pre-check 

9262 # existence to distinguish "agent does not exist" from "visibility 

9263 # deny" in the structured warning log emitted by service callers. 

9264 agent = db.query(DbA2AAgent).filter(DbA2AAgent.name == agent_name, DbA2AAgent.enabled.is_(True)).first() 

9265 card = None 

9266 if agent is not None: 

9267 card = await service.get_agent_card(db, agent_name, user_email=user_email, token_teams=token_teams) 

9268 if card is None: 

9269 logger.warning("A2A agent %r visibility-denied for user=%s teams=%s on card", agent_name, user_email, token_teams) 

9270 if card is None: 

9271 a2a_server_service = A2AServerService() 

9272 card = a2a_server_service.get_server_agent_card(db, agent_name, user_email=user_email, token_teams=token_teams) 

9273 if card is None: 

9274 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"agent '{agent_name}' not found"}) 

9275 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=card) 

9276 except Exception: 

9277 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9278 try: 

9279 db.rollback() 

9280 except Exception: 

9281 try: 

9282 db.invalidate() 

9283 except Exception: 

9284 pass # nosec B110 

9285 raise 

9286 finally: 

9287 db.close() 

9288 

9289 

9290@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/tasks/get/") 

9291@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/tasks/get") 

9292async def handle_internal_a2a_tasks_get(request: Request): 

9293 """Retrieve an A2A task for Rust module execution.""" 

9294 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9295 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9296 

9297 db = SessionLocal() 

9298 try: 

9299 body = await request.json() 

9300 task_id = body.get("task_id") 

9301 agent_id = body.get("agent_id") 

9302 if not task_id or not isinstance(task_id, str): 

9303 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "task_id is required and must be a string"}) 

9304 if agent_id is not None and not isinstance(agent_id, str): 

9305 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "agent_id must be a string"}) 

9306 

9307 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9308 service = A2AAgentService() 

9309 task = await service.get_task(db, task_id, agent_id=agent_id, user_email=user_email, token_teams=token_teams) 

9310 if task is None: 

9311 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"task '{task_id}' not found"}) 

9312 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=task) 

9313 except Exception: 

9314 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9315 try: 

9316 db.rollback() 

9317 except Exception: 

9318 try: 

9319 db.invalidate() 

9320 except Exception: 

9321 pass # nosec B110 

9322 raise 

9323 finally: 

9324 db.close() 

9325 

9326 

9327@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/tasks/list/") 

9328@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/tasks/list") 

9329async def handle_internal_a2a_tasks_list(request: Request): 

9330 """List A2A tasks for Rust module execution.""" 

9331 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9332 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9333 

9334 db = SessionLocal() 

9335 try: 

9336 body = await request.json() 

9337 agent_id = body.get("agent_id") 

9338 state = body.get("state") 

9339 if agent_id is not None and not isinstance(agent_id, str): 

9340 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "agent_id must be a string"}) 

9341 if state is not None and not isinstance(state, str): 

9342 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "state must be a string"}) 

9343 limit = min(int(body.get("limit", 100)), 1000) 

9344 offset = max(int(body.get("offset", 0)), 0) 

9345 

9346 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9347 service = A2AAgentService() 

9348 tasks = service.list_tasks(db, agent_id=agent_id, state=state, limit=limit, offset=offset, user_email=user_email, token_teams=token_teams) 

9349 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content={"tasks": tasks}) 

9350 except Exception: 

9351 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9352 try: 

9353 db.rollback() 

9354 except Exception: 

9355 try: 

9356 db.invalidate() 

9357 except Exception: 

9358 pass # nosec B110 

9359 raise 

9360 finally: 

9361 db.close() 

9362 

9363 

9364@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/tasks/cancel/") 

9365@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/tasks/cancel") 

9366async def handle_internal_a2a_tasks_cancel(request: Request): 

9367 """Cancel an A2A task for Rust module execution.""" 

9368 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9369 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9370 

9371 db = SessionLocal() 

9372 try: 

9373 body = await request.json() 

9374 task_id = body.get("task_id") 

9375 agent_id = body.get("agent_id") 

9376 if not task_id or not isinstance(task_id, str): 

9377 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "task_id is required and must be a string"}) 

9378 if agent_id is not None and not isinstance(agent_id, str): 

9379 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "agent_id must be a string"}) 

9380 

9381 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9382 service = A2AAgentService() 

9383 task = await service.cancel_task(db, task_id, agent_id=agent_id, user_email=user_email, token_teams=token_teams) 

9384 if task is None: 

9385 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"task '{task_id}' not found"}) 

9386 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=task) 

9387 except Exception: 

9388 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9389 try: 

9390 db.rollback() 

9391 except Exception: 

9392 try: 

9393 db.invalidate() 

9394 except Exception: 

9395 pass # nosec B110 

9396 raise 

9397 finally: 

9398 db.close() 

9399 

9400 

9401@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/create/") 

9402@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/create") 

9403async def handle_internal_a2a_push_create(request: Request): 

9404 """Create a push notification config for Rust A2A runtime.""" 

9405 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9406 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9407 

9408 db = SessionLocal() 

9409 try: 

9410 body = await request.json() 

9411 if not body.get("a2a_agent_id") or not body.get("task_id") or not body.get("webhook_url"): 

9412 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "a2a_agent_id, task_id, and webhook_url are required"}) 

9413 

9414 # Validate webhook URL through the schema to enforce SSRF protection. 

9415 try: 

9416 validated = A2APushNotificationConfigCreate(**body) 

9417 except Exception as validation_err: 

9418 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": f"invalid push config: {validation_err}"}) 

9419 

9420 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9421 service = A2AAgentService() 

9422 if not await service._check_agent_access_by_id(db, body["a2a_agent_id"], user_email, token_teams): # pylint: disable=protected-access 

9423 logger.warning("A2A agent_id=%s visibility-denied for user=%s teams=%s on push/create", body["a2a_agent_id"], user_email, token_teams) 

9424 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": "agent not found"}) 

9425 cfg = service.create_push_config(db, validated.model_dump()) 

9426 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=cfg) 

9427 except Exception: 

9428 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9429 try: 

9430 db.rollback() 

9431 except Exception: 

9432 try: 

9433 db.invalidate() 

9434 except Exception: 

9435 pass # nosec B110 

9436 raise 

9437 finally: 

9438 db.close() 

9439 

9440 

9441@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/get/") 

9442@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/get") 

9443async def handle_internal_a2a_push_get(request: Request): 

9444 """Retrieve a push notification config for Rust A2A runtime.""" 

9445 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9446 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9447 

9448 db = SessionLocal() 

9449 try: 

9450 body = await request.json() 

9451 task_id = body.get("task_id") 

9452 agent_id = body.get("agent_id") 

9453 if not task_id: 

9454 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "task_id is required"}) 

9455 

9456 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9457 service = A2AAgentService() 

9458 cfg = service.get_push_config(db, task_id, agent_id=agent_id) 

9459 if cfg is None: 

9460 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"push config for task '{task_id}' not found"}) 

9461 if not await service._check_agent_access_by_id(db, cfg["a2a_agent_id"], user_email, token_teams): # pylint: disable=protected-access 

9462 logger.warning("A2A push-config task_id=%s (agent_id=%s) visibility-denied for user=%s teams=%s on push/get", task_id, cfg["a2a_agent_id"], user_email, token_teams) 

9463 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"push config for task '{task_id}' not found"}) 

9464 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content=cfg) 

9465 except Exception: 

9466 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9467 try: 

9468 db.rollback() 

9469 except Exception: 

9470 try: 

9471 db.invalidate() 

9472 except Exception: 

9473 pass # nosec B110 

9474 raise 

9475 finally: 

9476 db.close() 

9477 

9478 

9479@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/list/") 

9480@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/list") 

9481async def handle_internal_a2a_push_list(request: Request): 

9482 """List push notification configs for Rust A2A runtime.""" 

9483 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9484 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9485 

9486 db = SessionLocal() 

9487 try: 

9488 body = await request.json() 

9489 agent_id = body.get("agent_id") 

9490 task_id = body.get("task_id") 

9491 

9492 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9493 service = A2AAgentService() 

9494 # Use the dispatch-oriented listing so the Rust sidecar receives 

9495 # plaintext auth_token values decrypted from the encrypted DB column. 

9496 # Visibility is enforced in SQL via ``_visible_agent_ids`` — no 

9497 # Python-side post-filter needed. 

9498 configs = service.list_push_configs_for_dispatch( 

9499 db, 

9500 agent_id=agent_id, 

9501 task_id=task_id, 

9502 user_email=user_email, 

9503 token_teams=token_teams, 

9504 ) 

9505 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content={"configs": configs}) 

9506 except Exception: 

9507 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9508 try: 

9509 db.rollback() 

9510 except Exception: 

9511 try: 

9512 db.invalidate() 

9513 except Exception: 

9514 pass # nosec B110 

9515 raise 

9516 finally: 

9517 db.close() 

9518 

9519 

9520@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/delete/") 

9521@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/push/delete") 

9522async def handle_internal_a2a_push_delete(request: Request): 

9523 """Delete a push notification config for Rust A2A runtime.""" 

9524 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9525 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9526 

9527 db = SessionLocal() 

9528 try: 

9529 body = await request.json() 

9530 config_id = body.get("config_id") 

9531 if not config_id: 

9532 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "config_id is required"}) 

9533 

9534 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9535 service = A2AAgentService() 

9536 cfg = db.query(A2APushNotificationConfig).filter(A2APushNotificationConfig.id == config_id).first() 

9537 if cfg and not await service._check_agent_access_by_id(db, cfg.a2a_agent_id, user_email, token_teams): # pylint: disable=protected-access 

9538 logger.warning("A2A push-config id=%s (agent_id=%s) visibility-denied for user=%s teams=%s on push/delete", config_id, cfg.a2a_agent_id, user_email, token_teams) 

9539 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"push config '{config_id}' not found"}) 

9540 deleted = service.delete_push_config(db, config_id) 

9541 if not deleted: 

9542 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": f"push config '{config_id}' not found"}) 

9543 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content={"deleted": True}) 

9544 except Exception: 

9545 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9546 try: 

9547 db.rollback() 

9548 except Exception: 

9549 try: 

9550 db.invalidate() 

9551 except Exception: 

9552 pass # nosec B110 

9553 raise 

9554 finally: 

9555 db.close() 

9556 

9557 

9558@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/events/flush/") 

9559@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/events/flush") 

9560async def handle_internal_a2a_events_flush(request: Request): 

9561 """Batch-insert streaming events to PG for durability.""" 

9562 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9563 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9564 

9565 db = SessionLocal() 

9566 try: 

9567 body = await request.json() 

9568 events = body.get("events", []) 

9569 if not events: 

9570 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content={"count": 0}) 

9571 

9572 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9573 service = A2AAgentService() 

9574 

9575 # Verify the caller has access to the agents that own the referenced tasks. 

9576 # Unknown task_ids (no matching row) previously slipped past this 

9577 # check — a caller could flush events for a task_id that does not 

9578 # exist yet, bypassing visibility entirely. Reject the batch when 

9579 # any referenced task_id has no owning agent row. 

9580 task_ids = {e["task_id"] for e in events if "task_id" in e} 

9581 if task_ids: 

9582 tasks = db.query(DbA2ATask).filter(DbA2ATask.task_id.in_(task_ids)).all() 

9583 known_task_ids = {t.task_id for t in tasks} 

9584 unknown_task_ids = task_ids - known_task_ids 

9585 if unknown_task_ids: 

9586 logger.warning( 

9587 "A2A events/flush denied: user=%s teams=%s references unknown task_id(s) %s", 

9588 user_email, 

9589 token_teams, 

9590 sorted(unknown_task_ids), 

9591 ) 

9592 return ORJSONResponse( 

9593 status_code=400, 

9594 content={"error": "events reference unknown task_ids", "unknown_task_ids": sorted(unknown_task_ids)}, 

9595 ) 

9596 agent_ids = {t.a2a_agent_id for t in tasks} 

9597 for agent_id in agent_ids: 

9598 if not await service._check_agent_access_by_id(db, agent_id, user_email, token_teams): # pylint: disable=protected-access 

9599 logger.warning("A2A events/flush denied: user=%s teams=%s lacks access to agent_id=%s (referenced by a flushed event)", user_email, token_teams, agent_id) 

9600 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "access denied for one or more referenced tasks"}) 

9601 

9602 count = service.flush_events(db, events) 

9603 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content={"count": count}) 

9604 except Exception: 

9605 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9606 try: 

9607 db.rollback() 

9608 except Exception: 

9609 try: 

9610 db.invalidate() 

9611 except Exception: 

9612 pass # nosec B110 

9613 raise 

9614 finally: 

9615 db.close() 

9616 

9617 

9618@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/events/replay/") 

9619@utility_router.post("/_internal/a2a/events/replay") 

9620async def handle_internal_a2a_events_replay(request: Request): 

9621 """Replay events from PG for stream reconnection.""" 

9622 if not _is_trusted_internal_mcp_runtime_request(request): 

9623 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=403, content={"error": "untrusted request"}) 

9624 

9625 db = SessionLocal() 

9626 try: 

9627 body = await request.json() 

9628 task_id = body.get("task_id") 

9629 after_sequence = int(body.get("after_sequence", 0)) 

9630 limit = min(int(body.get("limit", 1000)), 10000) 

9631 if not task_id: 

9632 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"error": "task_id required"}) 

9633 

9634 user_email, token_teams = _get_internal_a2a_scope_context(request) 

9635 service = A2AAgentService() 

9636 task_row = db.query(DbA2ATask).filter(DbA2ATask.task_id == task_id).first() 

9637 if task_row is None: 

9638 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": "task not found"}) 

9639 if not await service._check_agent_access_by_id(db, task_row.a2a_agent_id, user_email, token_teams): # pylint: disable=protected-access 

9640 logger.warning("A2A task_id=%s (agent_id=%s) visibility-denied for user=%s teams=%s on events/replay", task_id, task_row.a2a_agent_id, user_email, token_teams) 

9641 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=404, content={"error": "task not found"}) 

9642 events = service.replay_events(db, task_id, after_sequence, limit=limit) 

9643 return ORJSONResponse(status_code=200, content={"events": events}) 

9644 except Exception: 

9645 logger.exception("Internal A2A endpoint error") 

9646 try: 

9647 db.rollback() 

9648 except Exception: 

9649 try: 

9650 db.invalidate() 

9651 except Exception: 

9652 pass # nosec B110 

9653 raise 

9654 finally: 

9655 db.close() 

9656 

9657 

9658async def _maybe_forward_affinitized_rpc_request( 

9659 request: Request, 

9660 *, 

9661 method: str, 

9662 params: Dict[str, Any], 

9663 req_id: Any, 

9664 lowered_request_headers: Dict[str, str], 

9665) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]: 

9666 """Forward an MCP request to the owning worker when session affinity requires it. 

9667 

9668 Args: 

9669 request: Incoming RPC request. 

9670 method: MCP method name being executed. 

9671 params: Parsed JSON-RPC params payload. 

9672 req_id: JSON-RPC request identifier. 

9673 lowered_request_headers: Lower-cased request headers used for forwarding. 

9674 

9675 Returns: 

9676 Forwarded JSON-RPC response payload when affinity forwarding handled the 

9677 request, otherwise ``None`` so local execution can continue. 

9678 """ 

9679 request_headers = request.headers 

9680 rpc_client_host = getattr(getattr(request, "client", None), "host", None) 

9681 rpc_from_loopback = rpc_client_host in ("127.0.0.1", "::1") if rpc_client_host else False 

9682 mcp_session_id = request_headers.get("mcp-session-id") or request_headers.get("x-mcp-session-id") 

9683 is_internally_forwarded = rpc_from_loopback and request_headers.get("x-forwarded-internally") == "true" 

9684 

9685 if settings.mcpgateway_session_affinity_enabled and mcp_session_id and method != "initialize" and not is_internally_forwarded: 

9686 # First-Party 

9687 from mcpgateway.services.session_affinity import SessionAffinity, WORKER_ID # pylint: disable=import-outside-toplevel 

9688 

9689 if not SessionAffinity.is_valid_mcp_session_id(mcp_session_id): 

9690 logger.debug("Invalid MCP session id for affinity forwarding, executing locally") 

9691 return None 

9692 

9693 session_short = mcp_session_id[:8] if len(mcp_session_id) >= 8 else mcp_session_id 

9694 logger.debug("[AFFINITY] Worker %s | Session %s... | Method: %s | RPC request received, checking affinity", WORKER_ID, session_short, method) 

9695 try: 

9696 # First-Party 

9697 from mcpgateway.services.session_affinity import get_session_affinity # pylint: disable=import-outside-toplevel 

9698 

9699 pool = get_session_affinity() 

9700 forwarded_response = await pool.forward_request_to_owner( 

9701 mcp_session_id, 

9702 {"method": method, "params": params, "headers": lowered_request_headers, "req_id": req_id}, 

9703 ) 

9704 if forwarded_response is not None: 

9705 logger.info("[AFFINITY] Worker %s | Session %s... | Method: %s | Forwarded response received", WORKER_ID, session_short, method) 

9706 if "error" in forwarded_response: 

9707 return {"jsonrpc": "2.0", "error": forwarded_response["error"], "id": req_id} 

9708 return {"jsonrpc": "2.0", "result": forwarded_response.get("result", {}), "id": req_id} 

9709 except RuntimeError: 

9710 logger.debug("[AFFINITY] Worker %s | Session %s... | Method: %s | Pool not initialized, executing locally", WORKER_ID, session_short, method) 

9711 return None 

9712 

9713 if is_internally_forwarded and mcp_session_id: 

9714 # First-Party 

9715 from mcpgateway.services.session_affinity import WORKER_ID # pylint: disable=import-outside-toplevel 

9716 

9717 session_short = mcp_session_id[:8] if len(mcp_session_id) >= 8 else mcp_session_id 

9718 logger.debug("[AFFINITY] Worker %s | Session %s... | Method: %s | Internally forwarded request, executing locally", WORKER_ID, session_short, method) 

9719 

9720 return None 

9721 

9722 

9723async def _execute_rpc_initialize( 

9724 request: Request, 

9725 user, 

9726 *, 

9727 params: Dict[str, Any], 

9728 server_id: Optional[str], 

9729 mcp_session_id: Optional[str], 

9730): 

9731 """Execute the MCP initialize handshake while preserving session ownership semantics. 

9732 

9733 Args: 

9734 request: Incoming RPC request. 

9735 user: Authenticated user payload. 

9736 params: Initialize params payload. 

9737 server_id: Optional virtual server identifier. 

9738 mcp_session_id: Session id from the transport headers, when present. 

9739 

9740 Returns: 

9741 Serialized initialize result payload. 

9742 

9743 Raises: 

9744 JSONRPCError: If session ownership cannot be claimed or validated. 

9745 """ 

9746 init_session_id = params.get("session_id") or params.get("sessionId") or request.query_params.get("session_id") 

9747 requester_email, requester_is_admin = get_request_identity(request, user) 

9748 

9749 if init_session_id:
